target: 5. Hunger Pangs
Hmm hm hm hm~♪
Hoine, where are you headed next?
It's a secret! Look forward to it when we get there!
I don't know where our next destination is, but even if you try to surprise me--
Ah…
Was that the bug in your stomach just now?
Ahahahaha! I was thinking about where to go next and my stomach growled.
(Is she that hungry? Then, could our next destination be... Considering we ran into Mio earlier...)
Why do stomachs growl, I wonder? Are there really bugs inside?
Of course there aren't. It's hunger contractions.
It is said that the sound is produced when the contents of the stomach are pushed out into the duodenum and small intestine by the contraction of the stomach wall.
Hmm, I don't really get it.
Just remember that it's not bugs. That's enough for now.
Okaaay.
Are you hungry, Hizuru-chan?
No, not really…
Ah, it growled again.
Ahahahahaha! What is this, it's growling so much! Ahahahahahahaha!
...I don't know what's so funny, but it should settle down if you eat something at our next destination.
But I don't have any money on me, you know?
I'll pay. If it's Kofune, I have enough cash for whatever you order, so don't worry.
Yay! Thanks, Hizuru-chan!
I wouldn't be able to stand you endlessly making that noise right next to me from here on out...
Huh? But how did you know our next destination was Kofune?
That's simple deduction.
That's so cool! You really are amazing, Hizuru-chan!
Look! My stomach is surprised too!
Remember my explanation from earlier. That is simply a physiological phenomenon.
Welcome!
Excuse me~!
Ah, Hoine-chan. And...
Alain, it's been a while.
If it isn't Hizuru! You came back to the island?
Yes, I just arrived today. I'm glad to see that both you and the restaurant are doing well.
Thankfully, yes. I'm glad to see you're looking well too, Hizuru.
So, what are you up to today? Babysitting Hoine-chan?
Reluctantly, it has come to that...
Hoine, no need to hold back. You can order whatever you'd like.
Then I'll have a parfait!
Will that be enough?
You're right! Then two parfaits!
Hahaha! You look like you're at your wit's end!
...Children are far too incomprehensible and unpredictable. I have absolutely no idea how to handle them.
Well, I'm sure. Mio and Ushio gave me a lot of trouble when they were little too.
You'll understand once you have kids of your own, Hizuru.
Huh...?
You've reached an age where it wouldn't be strange for you to have a daughter around Hoine-chan's age. You must have at least one good person in your life, right?
N-None of your business! Hurry up and serve the parfaits!
Understood, two parfaits.
Ah, wait, two is too many--
Yay~!
Thanks for waiting. Two parfaits, here you go.

One for Hoine.
The other for me.
Huh? I can't eat both of them?
If it's not enough, order something else. But nothing cold, it'll chill your stomach too much.
Okaaaay! Well then, time to eat~!
Mmm! Delicious~! Hizuru-chan, you eat up too!

Don't worry about me.
Focus on eating.
Okaaaay!
(...This should keep her quiet for a bit.)
(The island's scenery is one thing, but... This restaurant hasn't changed at all either.)
(It's exactly the same as when I was still in my teens.)
(It almost feels like... if I turn around, Asako and the me from back then will be sitting there...)
(Going back in time... Something like that could never actually happen.)
(There is nothing unchanging in this world, and everything is destined to change with time.)
(But, because of that-- Returning to the past is also a universal dream of humanity.)
(Going back in time, returning to the past... This isn't a bad theme either.)
Thank you for the meal!
Hm? You're already done eating?
Yeah, it was super delicious! I'm so full now!
…That's good.
(Even though her stomach was growling that much, can a single parfait really satisfy her?)
(Was the capacity of a child's stomach really like that... I've completely forgotten how I used to be.)
Alain, thanks for the food. I'll leave the money on the table.
Yeah, let's take our time and chat next time you come.
Sounds good. Well then, we'll be going now.
Bye~!
